summary: Calendar feature testing completed. Backend: 13/13 API tests passed. Frontend: All calendar features verified including a bug fix. Fixed missing status normalization bug causing action buttons to not display when clicking events from sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: FullCalendar widget properly integrated with month/week/day views
Event type colors correctly applied (blue=meeting, red=court_hearing, amber=deadline)
All professional action buttons (Mark Complete, Reschedule, Create Task, Cancel) working
CSRF token properly required for POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE requests
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_calendar_events.py - Created calendar events API test suite
/app/frontend/src/components/practice-management/CalendarTab.jsx - Fixed status normalization for sidebar event clicks (lines 460, 499)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar feature fully implemented with FullCalendar widget. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/practice/events, POST /api/practice/events/{id}/complete (mark complete with outcome), POST /api/practice/events/{id}/cancel (cancel with reason - min 5 chars), POST /api/practice/events/{id}/reschedule (reschedule with new datetime), POST /api/practice/events/{id}/convert-to-task (create follow-up task), PATCH /api/practice/events/{id}/move (drag-drop move). CSRF token required for all modifying requests - obtained from login response as csrf_token, sent as X-CSRF-Token header.

Backend API Tests.POST /api/practice/events (meeting): PASS - Creates meeting event with status=scheduled
Backend API Tests.POST /api/practice/events/{id}/complete: PASS - Marks event completed with outcome
Backend API Tests.All event types create correctly: PASS - meeting, court_hearing, deadline, reminder, appointment

Frontend UI Tests.Reschedule button shows dialog: PASS - With new datetime and reason fields
Frontend UI Tests.Create Task button shows dialog: PASS - With task title, due date, priority
Frontend UI Tests.Cancel button shows dialog: PASS - With reason field and min 5 char validation
Frontend UI Tests.Edit and Delete buttons visible: PASS - In footer of view modal

sidebar_event_status_normalization.issue: Events clicked from Upcoming Events sidebar did not show action buttons because status was not normalized to 'scheduled'
sidebar_event_status_normalization.root_cause: The sidebar onClick handler directly called setViewEvent(event) without normalizing status, unlike handleEventClick which adds status: event.status || 'scheduled'
sidebar_event_status_normalization.fix: Changed setViewEvent(event) to setViewEvent({ ...event, status: event.status || 'scheduled' }) at lines 460 and 499 in CalendarTab.jsx
